headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://accounts.google.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https://upload.wikimedia.org https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org https://*.googleusercontent.com; connect-src 'self' https://en.wikipedia.org https://accounts.google.com; frame-src https://accounts.google.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
